---
title: "Reference"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  comment: ""
---

This page renders the current CLI help by running the `ir` executable on `PATH` during the Quarto render.

```{r}
cli_help <- function(...) {
  stopifnot(
    requireNamespace("fansi", quietly = TRUE),
    requireNamespace("htmltools", quietly = TRUE),
    requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE)
  )

  args <- c(..., "--help")
  old_options <- options(cli.num_colors = 256L)
  on.exit(options(old_options), add = TRUE)

  output <- system2(
    "ir",
    args,
    stdout = TRUE,
    stderr = TRUE,
    env = c("CLICOLOR_FORCE=1", "CLICOLOR=1")
  )
  status <- attr(output, "status")

  if (!is.null(status)) {
    stop(
      "`ir ", paste(args, collapse = " "), "` failed with status ", status,
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output_text <- paste(output, collapse = "\n")
  if (
    length(output) < 3L ||
      !grepl("Usage:", output_text, fixed = TRUE) ||
      !grepl("Options:", output_text, fixed = TRUE)
  ) {
    stop(
      "`ir ", paste(args, collapse = " "),
      "` produced incomplete help output; check the `ir` executable on PATH.",
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output <- htmltools::htmlEscape(output)
  output <- fansi::sgr_to_html(output, term.cap = "256")
  knitr::asis_output(paste0(
    "<pre class=\"ir-cli-help\"><code>",
    paste(output, collapse = "\n"),
    "</code></pre>\n"
  ))
}
```

## `ir`

```{r}
cli_help()
```

## `ir run`

```{r}
cli_help("run")
```

## `ir render`

```{r}
cli_help("render")
```

## `ir tool`

```{r}
cli_help("tool")
```

## `ir tool run`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "run")
```

## `ir tool install`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "install")
```

## `ir cache`

```{r}
cli_help("cache")
```

## `ir cache dir`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "dir")
```

## `ir cache clean`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "clean")
```
